headline: KKR & Co. Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE: KKR) announced today that it plans to release its financial results for the first quarter 2026 on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, before the opening of trading on the New York Stock Exchange.

headline: KKR (KKR) to Privatize Taiyo Holdings via Tender Offer
summary: KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is one of the best US stocks to buy and hold for the next 3 years. On March 31, KKR and Taiyo Holdings announced an agreement for KKR to acquire the company through a tender offer, leading to its privatization. summary: The closing comes even as private equity endures its worst fundraising environment in nearly a decade.

headline: KKR Closes $23 Billion North America Private Equity Fund
summary: NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--KKR, a leading global investment firm, today announced the final closing of KKR North America Fund XIV ("NAX4" or the "Fund"), an approximately $23 billion fund focused on pursuing opportunistic private equity investments in North America through a disciplined and consistent investment approach. NAX4 is the largest private equity fund raised that focuses on investing solely in North America.

raw.headline: KKR Closes $23 Billion North America Private Equity Fund
raw.summary: NEW YORK, April 02, 2026--KKR, a leading global investment firm, today announced the final closing of KKR North America Fund XIV ("NAX4" or the "Fund"), an approximately $23 billion fund focused on pursuing opportunistic private equity investments in North America through a disciplined and consistent investment approach. NAX4 is the largest private equity fund raised that focuses on investing solely in North America.

headline: Private Equity Sales Slump as AI, War Bring New Stress Fractures
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Private equity sales have fallen by more than a third this year, as developments in artificial intelligence and war in Iran heap pressure on a subdued exit market.Buyout firms were sellers in deals valued at about $103 billion in the first quarter, data compiled by Bloomberg show. Though still above historical averages, the figure is roughly 36% lower than the same period a year ago and stands out in an M&A market flush with megadeals. headline: Assessing KKR (KKR) Valuation After Choppy Returns And Mixed Undervaluation Signals
summary: Recent performance check on KKR stock KKR (KKR) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a 1 day decline, modest gains over the past week and month, but a sharper negative move over the past 3 months and year to date. These swings come as the firm reports annual revenue of about US$25.7b and net income of roughly US$2.2b. These numbers give you a starting point for thinking about scale and profitability.
